items.name: Title background
items.art_prompt: empty late-night cocktail bar seen from the entrance, warm amber lamplight pooling on a polished wooden counter, shelves of softly glowing unlabeled bottles, thin drifting smoke, deep plum darkness wrapping the edges

items.name: Bar counter gameplay scene
items.art_prompt: first-person view from behind the bar counter looking at an empty guest seat, wooden counter foreground with subtle brush texture, candle-lit, shelves of glowing bottles blurred behind, generous empty space in the lower half for UI

items.name: Back Room shop scene
items.art_prompt: cozy speakeasy back room with a velvet curtain doorway, small round table with a cash tin and stacked crates of bottles, single warm bulb hanging, teal shadows in the corners, slightly mysterious but inviting
